name: Nanovation Microtech, Inc.
summary: Nanovation Microtech, Inc. develops and sells applications and games for iPhone, iPad, and Apple watches. The company was formerly known as Kalmin Corp. and changed its name to Nanovation Microtech, Inc. in July 2020. The company was founded in 2016 and is based in Copenhagen, Denmark. Nanovation Microtech, Inc. is a subsidiary of Greenfield International Limited.
